title: ORBITAL SANDER
descrption: A compact orbital sander used for smooth finishing on wood and painted surfaces with low vibration and good control.

title: ANGLE GRINDER
descrption: A handheld grinder suitable for cutting, grinding, and surface cleanup on metal, tile, and other tough materials.

title: ELECTRIC DRILL
descrption: A reliable corded drill for drilling holes and light hammer-drill work in wood, metal, and masonry.

title: ELECTRIC PLANER
descrption: A woodworking planer used to flatten and trim wooden surfaces with consistent depth and clean finish.

title: MARBLE CUTTER
descrption: A high-speed cutting tool built for straight and controlled cuts in marble, stone, and tiles.

title: WOOD ROUTER
descrption: A precision routing tool for edge profiling, grooving, and shaping wood components in detail work.

title: JIGSAW
descrption: A versatile saw designed for curved and straight cuts on wood, plastic, and thin sheet materials.

title: HEAT GUN
descrption: A controlled hot-air tool used for paint stripping, shrink fitting, drying, and softening adhesives.

title: CNC LASER CUTTER
descrption: A computer-controlled laser system for fast and precise cutting or engraving of acrylic, plywood, and sheet material.

title: CNC MILLING MACHINE
descrption: A programmable milling machine for accurate machining of metal and engineering plastics for prototype parts.

title: DRILL PRESS
descrption: A stationary drilling machine that provides vertical, repeatable, and accurate hole making in workshop materials.

title: SHARP WINDER
descrption: A bench-mounted grinding and sharpening unit used to restore cutting edges on tools and workshop blades.

title: METAL CUT-OFF SAW
descrption: A heavy-duty chop saw meant for quick, straight cuts in metal bars, pipes, and structural sections.

title: POWER HACKSAW
descrption: A motorized hacksaw for repetitive metal cutting jobs where consistent feed and cut quality are needed.

title: BANDSAW
descrption: A continuous-blade saw used for straight or curved cuts in wood and other stock with smooth cutting action.

title: THICKNESS PLANER
descrption: A planer designed to reduce wood pieces to uniform thickness while maintaining parallel and smooth surfaces.

title: TABLE SAW
descrption: A workshop table saw for precise rip and cross cuts in timber sheets, planks, and joinery stock.

title: BELT & DISC SANDER
descrption: A dual sanding station combining belt and disc surfaces for rapid shaping, deburring, and fine finishing.

title: BENCH DRILL PRESS
descrption: A compact bench-mounted drilling setup for controlled drilling tasks on small to medium workpieces.

title: BENCH GRINDER
descrption: A fixed grinder used for edge sharpening, metal cleanup, and surface preparation in daily fabrication work.

title: ARC WELDER
descrption: An MMA arc welding machine suitable for strong welded joints in steel fabrication and repair operations.

title: TIG WELDER
descrption: A TIG welding unit for clean, high-quality weld beads on stainless steel and precision metal components.

title: TIG WELDER
descrption: A controlled TIG system optimized for accurate heat input and neat weld finishes on critical joints.

title: MIG WELDER
descrption: A wire-feed MIG welder built for productive welding on medium to thick metal sections.

title: CNC PLASMA CUTTER
descrption: A CNC plasma table for rapid profile cutting of conductive metal sheets with programmable accuracy.

title: CNC ROUTER
descrption: A computer-controlled router for carving, pocketing, and contouring wood, foam, and composite panels.

title: MINI LATHE
descrption: A small turning machine used for facing, threading, and cylindrical shaping of compact metal parts.

title: PAINT BOOTH
descrption: An enclosed spray area with controlled airflow to achieve cleaner paint finishes and safer coating operations.

title: AIR COMPRESSOR
descrption: A compressed air supply system that powers pneumatic tools and supports cleaning and spray applications.

title: SLA 3D PRINTER
descrption: A resin-based 3D printer capable of producing high-detail parts with smooth surfaces and fine feature quality.

title: CURING AND WASHING STATION
descrption: A post-processing station for resin prints that washes uncured resin and performs controlled UV curing.

title: FDM 3D PRINTER
descrption: A filament-based 3D printer suited for functional prototypes, concept models, and iterative part development.

title: 3D SCANNER
descrption: A non-contact scanning device for capturing object geometry and converting it into editable 3D digital models.
